query:
SELECT 'vendas' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total, MIN(dataVenda) as data_mais_antiga FROM vendas
UNION ALL
SELECT 'medicoes', COUNT(*), MIN(dataMedicao) FROM medicoes
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lotes', COUNT(*), MIN(dataEntrada) FROM lotes;
